title: odontarrhena alpestris
intro: Odontarrhena alpestris, also known as alpine cornflower or mountain cornflower, is a flowering plant native to the European Alps. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and promote relaxation, making it a popular natural remedy for stress and anxiety relief. Herbal preparations of Odontarrhena alpestris often take the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
